description: Current population-normalized Stage Execution Quality scores generated by canonical DS scoring code.
sql: SELECT CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS fleet_name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS pad_name, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS name, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS stage_num_td, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS formula_version, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS normalization_version, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS composite_score, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS score_a, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS score_b, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS score_c, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS score_d, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS top_driver, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS anomaly_count, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS substages_present, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_seconds, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_minutes, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS raw_a, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS raw_b, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS raw_c, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS cv_rate, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS cv_press, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS longest_run_frac, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS dip_rate_d, CAST(NULL AS DOUBLE PRECISION) AS design_rate_d, CAST(NULL AS BIGINT) AS population_size, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS population_signature, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS normalization_run_id, CAST(NULL AS TEXT) AS normalized_at FROM datastore:merged_fleet_stream_customer_full_v2 WHERE 1 = 0
